calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets (Probate Code Section 850(A)(3))
Off Calendar Jan-15-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Albert for Sandra Jones (Petitioner).

Mr. Albert stated that the Trust was amended at least six times and was restated, that his Client testified under penalty of perjury that it was their intention to transfer all of the accounts and that there was a general assignment, that all of the assets that were included were from a trust and that the property was the only asset that was not retitled in the Trust. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
